```json
  "Tan Shan Chien's contact information includes email tanshanchien@gmail.com and phone +6016-793-6308",
  "Tan Shan Chien studied Computer Science with a focus on Artificial Intelligence at University Malaya (CGPA 3.90), completed A levels at Methodist College Kuala Lumpur (CGPA 4.00), and served as Head of contest protocol at UM Cybersecurity Summit 2025 and President of MCKL Computer Programming Society",
  "Tan Shan Chien is proficient in Python, C, C++, Java, JavaScript, and assembly, with experience in frameworks including Django, Flask, OpenCV, Pyautogui, Pygame, Glfw, JavaFX, Java Spring Boot, FastAPI, and langchain/graph",
  "Tan Shan Chien works as a Software Engineer at Mindhive developing RAG pipelines, YOLOv12 for PDF processing, and ByeDB; previously developed AutoDocX using Java Spring Boot, a GUI automation tool saving three to four hours daily, Piano to MIDI converter, and a 3D space shooter game in C++",
  "Tan Shan Chien won multiple hackathons including Champion at Godamlah 2026, CodeFest 2025, Codenection 2025, Physics Hackathon 2025, and Programming League National 2025; placed 3rd at FutureHack 2025 and was Finalist at Malaysian Computing Olympiad 2023"
]
```
json_data: Tan Shan Chien's contact information includes email tanshanchien@gmail.com and phone +6016-793-6308

Tan Shan Chien studied Computer Science with a focus on Artificial Intelligence at University Malaya (CGPA 3.90), completed A levels at Methodist College Kuala Lumpur (CGPA 4.00), and served as Head of contest protocol at UM Cybersecurity Summit 2025 and President of MCKL Computer Programming Society

Tan Shan Chien is proficient in Python, C, C++, Java, JavaScript, and assembly, with experience in frameworks including Django, Flask, OpenCV, Pyautogui, Pygame, Glfw, JavaFX, Java Spring Boot, FastAPI, and langchain/graph

Tan Shan Chien works as a Software Engineer at Mindhive developing RAG pipelines, YOLOv12 for PDF processing, and ByeDB; previously developed AutoDocX using Java Spring Boot, a GUI automation tool saving three to four hours daily, Piano to MIDI converter, and a 3D space shooter game in C++

Tan Shan Chien won multiple hackathons including Champion at Godamlah 2026, CodeFest 2025, Codenection 2025, Physics Hackathon 2025, and Programming League National 2025; placed 3rd at FutureHack 2025 and was Finalist at Malaysian Computing Olympiad 2023
